[South-eastern Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 021/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC. LIEPAJA SOUTHWARDS.
FIRING EXERCISE IN PROGRESS ON JULY 16 FROM 0300 UTC TO JULY 17  2000 UTC IN
AREA “JURMALCIEMS” WITH A RADIUS OF 9 NM FROM CENTER PSN N 56-16.00N 020-47.00E
AREA CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISE
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16
CANCEL 172000 UTC JUL
